name: PURE CYCLE CORP
summary: Pure Cycle Corporation is a diversified water and wastewater service provider, land developer, and single-family home rental company operating in the Denver, Colorado area. It provides wholesale water and wastewater services through the Rangeview Metropolitan District, develops its 930-acre Sky Ranch master planned community along the I-70 corridor into residential and commercial lots, and owns 14 single-family rental homes with plans to expand to over 200 units.

products.name: Wholesale Water Services
products.description: Wholesale potable water supply and distribution serving over 1,600 SFE connections in the southeastern Denver metro area.

products.name: Wastewater Services
products.description: Wastewater collection, treatment, and reclaimed water delivery serving 1,153 SFE wastewater connections.

products.name: Land Development - Sky Ranch
products.description: Master planned community development of 930-acre Sky Ranch, zoned for up to 3,200 homes and 2M+ sq ft commercial space.

products.name: Single-Family Rental Homes
products.description: Single-family detached and townhome rental units at Sky Ranch, currently 14 homes rented with 200+ planned.

products.name: Industrial Water Sales
products.description: Raw water sales to oil and gas operators leasing more than 135,000 acres adjacent to the company's service area.

partnerships.description: Exclusive agreement to provide wholesale water and wastewater services to Rangeview District's 24,000-acre Lowry Ranch Service Area.
Partnership to build and operate Sky Ranch Academy K-12 charter school at Sky Ranch development.
Partnership to establish and operate Sky Ranch Academy charter school located at Sky Ranch.
Agreement providing up to 900 acre-feet of water supply annually for use in service area.
